---
output: github_document
---

# R [Shiny](https://shiny.posit.co/) Introduction

PNW Tribal Coding Group: 2026 Retreat

31 March 2026

Johnathan Evanilla - Bigelow laboratory for Ocean Sciences

Emal : jevailla@bigelow.org


## Acknowledgements + Resources

Materials in this workshop were adapted from:

- [Mastering Shiny](https://mastering-shiny.org/index.html) by Hadley Wickham

- [Building Web Applications with Shiny](https://rstudio-education.github.io/shiny-course/)

- [Shiny for R Cheat Sheet](https://shiny.posit.co/r/articles/start/cheatsheet/)


## Example Shiny Apps

- [MPA Europe - Species Distrbution Maps](https://shiny.obis.org/distmaps/)

- [WhaleMap](https://whalemap.org/WhaleMap/)

- [QR Code Generator](https://broccolito.shinyapps.io/qrcode_generator/)
